title: rhodalsine procumbens
side_effects: Rhodalsine procumbens can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and vomiting, due to its potential toxicity when ingested in large amounts. In some cases, it may also lead to allergic reactions, resulting in symptoms like skin rashes, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can cause liver and kidney damage, as well as interact negatively with certain medications. Furthermore, improper use of rhodalsine procumbens may also trigger cardiovascular problems, including increased heart rate and blood pressure.
